title: Kutladampatti Falls
tagline: Kutladampatti Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kutladampatti Falls is a waterfall located in the village of Kutladampatti near Vadipatti in Madurai district about 30 km (19 mi) northwest of Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kutladampatti Falls is a waterfall located in the village of Kutladampatti near Vadipatti in Madurai district about 30 km (19 mi) northwest of Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The waterfall is in a reserve forest managed by the Tamil Nadu Forest Department. The water falls from a height of about 27 metres (89 ft).

topPlaces.name: Mavur Dam
topPlaces.description: Mavur Dam is a masonry gravity dam located on Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Sirumalai hill is the prime catchment of the dam.

topPlaces.name: Vadipatti
topPlaces.description: T. Vadipatti is a panchayat town in the Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.and also known as "west gateway of Madurai.

topPlaces.name: Sirumalai
topPlaces.description: Sirumalai (Tamil: சிறுமலை) is a massif region of 60,000 acres (200 km2) situated in Dindigul District, Tamil Nadu, India. Located 25 km (16 mi) from Dindigul, 90 km (56 mi) from Madurai, and 125 km from Trichy.

topPlaces.name: Sperumalpatti
topPlaces.description: Sperumalpatti is a large village situated near Madurai District of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sembukudipatti
topPlaces.description: Sembukudipatti, is a small village near Vadipatti situated 22 km North West of Madurai in Tamil Nadu, India. This village is best known for the Metal Park Mountain, Vaguthumalai in Tamil, 1 km north to it.

items.note: Mavur Dam is a masonry gravity dam located on Dindigul district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Sirumalai hill is the prime catchment of the dam.
T. Vadipatti is a panchayat town in the Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.and also known as "west gateway of Madurai.

Sirumalai (Tamil: சிறுமலை) is a massif region of 60,000 acres (200 km2) situated in Dindigul District, Tamil Nadu, India. Located 25 km (16 mi) from Dindigul, 90 km (56 mi) from Madurai, and 125 km from Trichy.
Sperumalpatti is a large village situated near Madurai District of Tamil Nadu, India.

Sembukudipatti, is a small village near Vadipatti situated 22 km North West of Madurai in Tamil Nadu, India. This village is best known for the Metal Park Mountain, Vaguthumalai in Tamil, 1 km north to it.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kutladampatti Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kutladampatti Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kutladampatti Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kutladampatti Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kutladampatti Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kutladampatti Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Kutladampatti Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kutladampatti Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mavur Dam, Vadipatti, Sirumalai, Sperumalpatti, Sembukudipatti.
